name: Foundry ASP
description: Pre-flight to post-flight for OKX.AI Agent Service Providers. Validates ideas, prices services, lints listings, and bootstraps trust.

services.name: Validate Idea
services.description:
① Checks if your ASP idea is worth building by scoring demand, mapping competitors, and giving a build/maybe/kill verdict.
② User must provide: 1. idea (short text describing your service) 2. optional category (FINANCE, SOFTWARE_SERVICES, LIFESTYLE, ART_CREATION, EDUCATION, PRODUCTIVITY, SOCIAL).

services.name: Price Estimator
services.description:
① Returns real marketplace pricing distribution (p25/median/p75) for a category, plus a recommended fee based on complexity and expected volume.
② User must provide: 1. optional category 2. optional idea (for LLM complexity judgment) 3. optional expected_volume_per_day (number).

services.name: Lint Listing
services.description:
① Scores your draft listing 0-100 against OKX review rules learned from accepted listings, flags rejection reasons, and rewrites the name and descriptions in place.
② User must provide: 1. listing object with name, description, category, services array (each with name, description, type, fee, optional endpoint). Optional: rewrite (default true).

services.name: Bootstrap Trust
services.description:
① Calls your live endpoint, measures latency, checks JSON schema, and signs a Foundry Verified receipt on X Layer you can embed in your X post and listing.
② User must provide: 1. endpoint (https URL of your ASP) 2. optional service_name 3. optional caller_wallet.
